description: DIRECTION template, not detected directly - only reached via directory nesting (turbo, nx, its own children). Monorepo tooling is inherently tool-specific (Turborepo vs Nx plugins don't overlap), so this file declares no plugin of its own - it's an extension point plus a home for cross-tool notes.
_notes: See skills/update-changelog/SKILL.md's 'Monorepo mode' for this bundle's own workspace-aware changelog handling - unrelated to Claude Code plugins, but relevant to the same 'monorepo' projects this direction targets.

No plain pnpm/yarn/npm-workspaces-only or Lerna-specific plugin was found during research beyond what's bundled inside the Nx plugin's workspace-package-linking skill - if you're on plain workspaces without Turborepo or Nx, there's currently nothing to install here.
